updates.summary: This minor update includes AST type specification changes that tighten type definitions for several expression types. While these are generally improvements, the type changes could potentially affect code that relies on the previous type definitions.
breakingChanges: UnaryExpression.prefix type changed to always be true

ramifications: Code using UnaryExpression.prefix may need updates if it expected other values
TypeScript code relying on looser types for ArrowFunction, YieldExpression, or TSTypePredicate may require type adjustments
ESLint rules or custom parsers using these AST types may need modification

updates.summary: This minor update introduces TypeGen-aware Portable Text components that provide automatic type inference from Sanity TypeGen query results. The changes are additive, introducing new utility types and enhanced TypeScript support without breaking existing functionality.
ramifications: Enhanced TypeScript experience with automatic type inference for component handlers
New utility types (InferComponents, InferStrictComponents, InferValue) available for better type safety
Existing code continues to work unchanged while gaining improved type checking
May require TypeScript knowledge to fully utilize new features
Teams using Sanity TypeGen will benefit most from the enhanced typing

ramifications: Improved CORS error detection may change when CorsOriginError is reported
Applications using live functionality may experience more accurate CORS-related error messages
Minor behavioral change in error reporting could affect error handling logic
